reasoning: The control IA-5 (2) focuses on public key-based authentication, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the use of TLS certificates for securing API server communications and OIDC for user authentication. Kubernetes supports client certificate authentication and OIDC, which are public key-based authentication mechanisms. These checks ensure that Kubernetes clusters are configured to use these secure authentication methods.
title: Authenticator Management | Public Key-based Authentication
